creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #1)

There are also other ghostscript related issues reported which are either broken or do not reproduce anymore. No reaction from port maintainer. I assume that he's not effectively maintaining them anymore. I have tried to evaluate all open issues and added comments whether they reproduce or not. I am eager to have last 9.x fixed and 10 into ports.
